mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.name AS course_name, t.real_name AS teacher_name FROM class_schedule s LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY s.day_of_week, s.start_time

SELECT s.*, c.name AS course_name, t.real_name AS teacher_name FROM class_schedule s LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE s.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY s.day_of_week, s.start_time

SELECT s.*, c.name AS course_name, t.real_name AS teacher_name FROM class_schedule s LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE s.course_id IN ( SELECT cs.course_id FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = #{studentId} ) ORDER BY s.day_of_week, s.start_time

SELECT s.*, c.name AS course_name, t.real_name AS teacher_name FROM class_schedule s LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id ORDER BY s.day_of_week, s.start_time
SELECT s.*, c.name AS course_name, t.real_name AS teacher_name FROM class_schedule s LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_schedule (course_id, teacher_id, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, location, remark) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{remark})
